message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title PB-158 UC8 SQD: Get campaigns customer is eligible for

actor "Next Customer" as User
participant "P&O\n(Core Next)" as PnO
database "P&O DB" as Database
participant "Core Bradesco" as CoreBradesco

rectangle "Next Platform" {
    PnO
    Database
}

note top
#Abstract:
This use cases describes the changes being made to an existing endpoint.
The endpoint will be modified so that it can be called by the user and
will return a list of campaigns that the customer is eligible for. A campaign
logo version number will be returned, as well as a campaign logo
image (if requested).
end note

note left of PnO
#Endpoint:
GET /campaigns

#Current implementation:
Currently only called by system management, returns a list of all campaigns
with the option to specify:
* NAME
* PARTNER_ID
* OFFER_ID

#Required implementation:
_Either through extension of existing API or new_, enable the user
to call the endpoint. When a user calls the endpoint return a list of campaigns
that that the user is eligible for. As part of the request, include an optional
field for whether or not to return the offer logo.

As part of the CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL response include:
* Campaign logo version number
* Campaign logo (optional)

**ENSURE BACKWARDS COMPATIBILITY IS MAINTAINED**
end note

User -> PnO: 1 Get campaigns user is eligible for ({NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID}, {INCLUDE_LOGO})
activate PnO
group filter on {NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID}
    PnO -> Database: 2 Get campaigns user is eligible for ({NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID}, {INCLUDE_LOGO})
    activate Database
    note right of Database
    #Note:
    Read P&O tables:
    * ELLIGIBLE_USER
    * CAMPAIGN
    end note
    Database --> PnO: 3 Read campaigns user is eligible for
    deactivate Database
    Database --> PnO: 4 Return campaigns user is eligible for (CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL)
end
deactivate PnO

alt if user has been or is eligible for at least one campaign
    PnO --> User: 5 Return campaigns user is eligible for (CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL)
else if user is not eligible for any active campaigns
    PnO --> User: 6 Return error (MESSAGE)
end

@enduml
```
